title: 6 PCS Reusable Mop Refill Pads for Flash Powermop, Microfiber Mop Pads Machine Washable for Wet Dry Floor Cleaning Suitable for Hardwood Laminate Floor
features: Best Choice : Compatible with the Flash Powermop. Made of upgrade microfiber and strong ability to absorb dust.
Wet and Dry Use : The mop refill pads not only can clean oil stains, water stains, etc., but also hair, dust, debris, etc.
Reusable and Machine Washable: The mop replacement pads are machine washable, easy to clean and store. You can reuse them and save time.
Widely Use of Most Floors: The mop pads are suitable for hardwood floor cleaning, composite floors, tile floors, glass, bamboo, laminate, ceramic, marble and etc.

Package Includes: This product contains 6 pcs mop pads for Flash Powermop, each with a size of 11.8 * 5.5 inch. If you have any questions in using, please feel free to contact us. We will provide a satisfy solution within 24 hours.
